comments: One of the three hour shows, although the recording is the final two hours from the VHF broadcast.

Tommy exhorts those people who couldn't get a decent signal in Mono previous to the second hour to write to their local BBC station (address found in the Radio Times!) to ask them to relay the VHF signal 'instead of whatever they choose to broadcast'.
The Quiet Riot LP is Number 1 in the States at the time, their UK tour supporting Judas Priest is due to start in two weeks.
Tommy plays an "interesting" track by a Hungarian band from an album sent to him by an unknown listener (but gets the band name and LP title transposed).

sessions.details: Recorded: 1977-10-28. First broadcast on the John Peel show. Now available on Queen On Air.
